parameters.query: INSERT INTO users (name, username, password, role, branch, status) VALUES ('{{ $json.body.name }}', '{{ $json.body.username }}', '{{ $json.body.password }}', '{{ $json.body.role || "user" }}', '{{ $json.body.branch }}', '{{ $json.body.status || "active" }}') ON CONFLICT (username) DO NOTHING RETURNING user_id, name, username, role, branch, status

UPDATE users SET name='{{ $json.body.name }}', role='{{ $json.body.role }}', branch='{{ $json.body.branch }}', status='{{ $json.body.status }}'{{ $json.body.password ? ', password=\'' + $json.body.password + '\'' : '' }} WHERE user_id={{ $json.body.user_id }} RETURNING user_id, name, username, role, branch, status

SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name, p.unit, COALESCE(s.qty_on_hand, 0) AS qty_on_hand, COALESCE((SELECT ROUND(SUM(ri.amount)::numeric / NULLIF(SUM(ri.qty)::numeric, 0), 4) FROM receive_items ri WHERE ri.product_id = p.product_id), 0) AS avg_cost_per_unit FROM products p LEFT JOIN stock s ON p.product_id = s.product_id WHERE p.is_active = true ORDER BY p.product_name
